Use cases and application scenarios: Device unlocking (e.g. waking a smartwatch from sleep); Accessing private or secure data; Continuous or context-aware authentication based on user activity; short enrollment times (2–10s), which are critical for real-time, user-friendly authentication on wearables
remaining challenges: Limited training data, transfer learning limits, poor model performance with long time windows, need for more diverse activity/emotion data.

independence: no, data is sent to the "computing system" for processing
remaining challenges: Robustness to real-life noise; Optimal wavelet selection; Computational constraints on mobile; Threshold tuning; Scalability & generalization (validation with 30 users; scaling to larger populations might affect both accuracy and processing requirements)

Use cases and application scenarios: Securing IoT Objects (smart locks, connected home electronics, access control gates, etc.)
remaining challenges: Include sensor noise, multi-modal fusion, model scalability, device variability, long-term changes in user’s biometric patterns, and ensuring robust on-device security.

Use cases and application scenarios: secure access, health record authentication, or continuous identity verification in wearable systems; personalized remote health monitoring and identity-aware wellness devices
independence: Device independence; Computational constraints on wearables; two subjects having different skin types
remaining challenges: Limited cohort diversity and generalization; No explicit impostor/return-to-zero evaluation; Long-term stability and situational shifts; energyefficient execution of the algorithm on wearable devices in realtime on a processor or hardware solutions

independence: no, training and inference require a GPU
remaining challenges: Due to the 11:1 training setup, the network needs to be retrained for every new user, which is very inefficient in a commercial setting. Additionally, energy-efficient execution of the algorithm on wearable devices still remains a challenge.
